isolation: gVisor container runtime (default); full Linux VM with VM Sandboxes (Beta)
name: Modal Sandboxes
notes: Docker-in-Sandbox requires opting into VM Sandboxes (Beta); the default gVisor-based Sandboxes do not support nested Docker.
price_headline: $0.00003942 per CPU core/sec, $0.00000667 per GiB memory/sec
pricing_model: Per-second, billed on CPU cores and memory
summary: Modal Sandboxes are isolated containers on Modal's serverless infrastructure for safely running untrusted code, including code produced by LLM-based agents. They run on a gVisor-based container runtime by default and can be opted into a full Linux VM for workloads that need a real kernel. They are used by AI coding-agent platforms and other systems that need to spin up many concurrent execution environments.
